title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Akshaya Private Limited - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Property Consultant to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
